----------------------------------------



As any child whoвҖҷs heard Aesop knows, the point of a fable is its moral. We see the consequences of falsely crying wolf. We learn why slow and steady wins the hare race.

So what is the moral of Claude Fable 5, AnthropicвҖҷs newest model, which this week we called the best coding model in the world https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vdmliZS1jaGVjay9hbnRocm9waWMtbXl0aG9zLW91ci1mYWJsZS12aWJlLWNoZWNrIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjZ9?

For engineers, the case is easy to make. For many knowledge workers, though, Fable might feel incremental. You may have one-shotted an impressive demo or two, but youвҖҷre probably not using it for your day-to-day work. Why would you? It costs twice as much and the results arenвҖҷt that much better.

But there is a certain class of developers who are feeling FableвҖҷs full force. These are people like Cora https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY29yYS5jb21wdXRlciIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo3fQ== general manager Kieran Klaassen https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGtpZXJhbl8xMzU1IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjh9, who are suddenly churning through his backlog of bug fixes and feature requests in hours instead of days. вҖңThis is my favorite model ever,вҖқ he told me.

WhatвҖҷs the difference between Kieran and everyone else? The difference between Kieran and most people using Fable isnвҖҷt simply that heвҖҷs a developer but that heвҖҷs at Level 7 or 8 on our scale of AI use https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZ3VpZGVzL3RoZS1laWdodC1sZXZlbHMtb2YtYWktYWRvcHRpb24iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0=: He delegates whole projects, lets agents work asynchronously, reviews the results, and feeds what he learns into the next run. In other words he writesвҖ”dare I say it, loops https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8veC5jb20vc3RlaXBldGUvc3RhdHVzLzIwNjM2OTcxNjI3NDgyNjA2MjciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9вҖ”not prompts.

For now, this might make Fable seem like a tool for developers. But in AI, developer workflows have a habit https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvb25lLWFwcC10by1ydWxlLWFsbC1rbm93bGVkZ2Utd29yayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMX0= of spreading to the rest of knowledge work. Claude Code started as a developer tool, and now the same methodology is being used for everything from slide decks to spreadsheets https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vYWxzby10cnVlLWZvci1odW1hbnMveW91LWFyZS10aGUtbW9zdC1leHBlbnNpdmUtbW9kZWwiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTJ9 inside of Cowork and Codex.

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYi5saW5rL2V2ZXJ5LW4zIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEzLCJhZHZlcnRpc2VtZW50X2lkIjoxMTgxfQ==

Cost-per-database pricing limits your creativity. You have a single instance, change things carefully, and are limited to one or two experiments. But Ghost is different. ItвҖҷs Postgres designed for agents that need unlimited databases on demand. Spin up 20 copies for testing, fork for each experiment, and delete what fails. Your agent handles everything: authentication, introspection, and queries, via native MCP integration. Built specifically for Claude Code and agentic workflows. Free tier: unlimited databases, 1TB storage.

Get started https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYi5saW5rL2V2ZXJ5LW4zP3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0X2J1dHRvbiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNCwiYWR2ZXJ0aXNlbWVudF9pZCI6MTE4MX0=
Want to sponsor Every? Click here https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Im1haWx0bzpzcG9uc29yc2hpcHNAZXZlcnkudG8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTV9.

If youвҖҷre not feeling FableвҖҷs force, thatвҖҷs probably because you havenвҖҷt yet started to treat your work like gardening ...

INSIDE EVERY

FABLE 5 VERSUS EVERYTHING ELSE

Anytime thereвҖҷs a major new model release, thereвҖҷs pressure to reconsider your AI setup. Or, if youвҖҷve just come out of a meditation retreat, maybe your entire life https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQUkgRXZlcnl3aGVyZSwgQWxsIGF0IE9uY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0Mjk4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9kYW5zaGlwcGVyL3N0YXR1cy8yMDExNzkxODAyNTUwOTIzNTc5IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjExfQ==.

Should you swap out your preferred model for the newest arrival? Is the new model sufficiently better to make the switch if you donвҖҷt like the harness https://every.?

Fable 5 has thrown the Every team into a new round of existential questioning. ItвҖҷs an obvious first choice for certain projectsвҖ”those that are large, complex, and

delegableвҖ”and an arguably worse, too-expensive fit for others.

After a week of testing the model, most of us at Every have settled into a two-prong approach: Fire up Fable for ambitious assignments, let it do its thing, and reach for your favored coding agent for smaller-scale, iterative tasks.

Head of growth Austin Tedesco https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQUkgRXZlcnl3aGVyZSwgQWxsIGF0IE9uY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0Mjk4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AdGVkZXNjYXUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTN9вҖҷs breakdown: Fable 5 demands вҖңa very different way of approaching knowledge work,вҖқ one that requires fine-tuning exactly what outcomes you want from the model, what information it needs to execute, and trusting it enough to sit back and let it cook.

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQUkgRXZlcnl3aGVyZSwgQWxsIGF0IE9uY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0Mjk4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ha2EubXMvQ29tbWFuZExpbmVIb21lcGFnZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNCwiYWR2ZXJ0aXNlbWVudF9pZCI6MTE4MH0=




THROW OUT THE OLD PLAYBOOK

The software development lifecycle wasnвҖҷt designed for agentic AIвҖ”and it shows. Tools, decisions, and the relationship with code itself are shifting faster than any playbook accounts for.

Meet Command Line https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQUkgRXZlcnl3aGVyZSwgQWxsIGF0IE9uY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0Mjk4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ha2EubXMvQ29tbWFuZExpbmVIb21lcGFnZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNSwiYWR2ZXJ0aXNlbWVudF9pZCI6MTE4MH0=, MicrosoftвҖҷs new blog straight from their technical teams, sharing what theyвҖҷre building, how theyвҖҷre operating, and what theyвҖҷre learning along the way. From articles like why the industry keeps confusing AI capability with AI reality to how theyвҖҷre designing agent-first devices from scratch, Command Line is written by builders, for builders.

вҖҳAI & IвҖҷ: FABLE 5 UPENDS HOW WE BUILD

Today, weвҖҷre releasing a new episode of our podcast AI & I https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IHRvIEdldCB0aGUgTW9zdCBPdXQgb2YgRmFibGUgNSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3BvZGNhc3QiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OH0=. Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IHRvIEdldCB0aGUgTW9zdCBPdXQgb2YgRmFibGUgNSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BkYW5zaGlwcGVyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjl9 sits down with Mike Krieger, the cofounder of Instagram and head of Anthropic Labs, to discuss what it feels like to build with Fable 5 https://every., a model powerful enough that itвҖҷs forcing him to rethink the very definition of productivity, engineering, and creative agency.

As someone who built one of the most popular consumer apps in the pre-GPT era and has had access to Fable 5 for months, Krieger has a rare vantage point on what the radical compression of the product development arc means for builders.

Watch on X https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IHRvIEdldCB0aGUgTW9zdCBPdXQgb2YgRmFibGUgNSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3guY29tL2RhbnNoaXBwZXIvc3RhdHVzLzIwNjQ3NjE2NTQ3ODk2ODEyODEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTF9 or YouTube https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IHRvIEdldCB0aGUgTW9zdCBPdXQgb2YgRmFibGUgNSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy55b3V0dWJlLmNvbS93YXRjaD92PVhXcFRnQ3ZnWWFFIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEyfQ==, or listen on Spotify https://every. or Apple Podcasts https://every._aT0xMDAwNzcyMDY3NjM3IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE0fQ==. You can also read the transcript https://every..

Here are the highlights:

 1. More work is happening overnight. Fable 5 is the first model capable enough that you can hand it a complex task, walk away, and trust it will be completed by morning. When it hits an obstacleвҖ”a remote service goes down, say, or a tool stops workingвҖ”it writes a workaround and forges ahead. That resilience has changed the daily rhythm of KriegerвҖҷs work: He now ends his workday by briefing the model on what needs to get done while he sleeps, rather than sitting down to do it himself.
 2. The gap between whatвҖҷs in your head and what exists in the world is closing. Given access to Fable 5 and a set of internal MCPs, an Anthropic recruiter described the experience as, вҖңThe first time in my life where I feel like the thing thatвҖҷs in my head and the thing that exists in the world are right next to each other. I can just do it.вҖқ This is the most meaningful thing about the new model class, Krieger saysвҖ”it allows non-engineers to create the exact products they need to get more done.
 3. Software engineering is dead. Long live software engineerin

LetвҖҷs _dive_ into the Valley of AIвҖҰ


----------

----------
#### **TRENDOS**

## [Your competitors are buying ads inside ChatGPT. You just don't know it yet](http://trendos.com/ad-radar?utm_medium=influencers&utm_source=creators&utm_campaign=ai-valley)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e562eacd-3731-47bb-8ed8-d87290b894ac/1200x630__2___1_.jpg?t=1781096516)
Follow image link: (http://trendos.com/ad-radar?utm_medium=influencers&utm_source=creators&utm_campaign=ai-valley)
Caption: Courtesy: Trendos

ChatGPT isn't just an AI assistant anymore. It's an ad platform and brands are already spending on it while most of their competitors look the other way. [Trendos](http://trendos.com/ad-radar?utm_medium=influencers&utm_source=creators&utm_campaign=ai-valley) tracked 1,000+ advertisers running ads in ChatGPT this month across retail, SaaS, travel, and more. The brands moving early are building a lead that's hard to close later. 

Trendos Ad Radar shows you exactly who's advertising, what their ads say, and where they send the clicks. Impression share, ad copy, final URLs - all of it. Sign up free. 100 prompts included. No demo, no paywall. Just the data.

[See who's buying ChatGPT ads вҶ’](http://trendos.com/ad-radar?utm_medium=influencers&utm_source=creators&utm_campaign=ai-valley)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### Anthropic launches Claude Fable 5, its most powerful public model yet

Youtube: Introducing Claude Fable 5 (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y9Wz2PV404E)

Anthropic has released [Claude Fable 5](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5), the first public version of its Mythos-class AI models. Until now, Mythos was only available through [Project Glasswing](https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing), a restricted program where more than 150 government agencies, critical infrastructure operators, and cybersecurity teams used the model to identify serious vulnerabilities across major software systems.

Anthropic says Fable 5 delivers major gains in coding, reasoning, scientific research, and long-running agent tasks, with early users already building [PokГ©mon games](https://x.com/ChrissGPT/status/2064460197423153379?s=20), [Minecraft clones](https://x.com/ChrissGPT/status/2064441716908703780?s=20), [custom 3D worlds](https://x.com/mattshumer_/status/2064449498596757643?s=20), [humanoid robot concepts](https://x.com/earthtojake/status/2064535702138990855?s=20), and [full applications](https://x.com/rileybrown/status/2064515211894091869?s=20) from a single prompt. The company says Fable is built on the same foundation as Mythos 5, but with additional safeguards that route certain cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry requests to Claude Opus 4.8 instead.

Fable is available across all Claude subscription plans until June 22, after which it will move to usage-based pricing. Anthropic is also ending its Zero Data Retention option for Mythos-class models and will require 30-day logging for all usage.

**Why it matters**

The capabilities once reserved for government agencies, infrastructure operators, and security researchers are now becoming available to the broader public. That line between "frontier model" and "consumer product" is disappearing faster than many expected.

The early examples are also revealing. Users aren't just generating text or debugging code. They're building games, designing products, creating software, and running projects that can take hours to complete. As AI becomes capable of handling larger chunks of work on its own, the bottleneck shifts from execution to deciding what to build and how to turn it into a business.
